  "rationale": "The crew's field method for GFCI/AFCI function and troubleshooting is less tidy than the preferred shop approach but still complies with the listed product instructions and project requirements. No local amendment or drawing note prohibits it. NEC 210.8 and 210.12 govern required GFCI and AFCI protection locations and do not mandate a specific test methodology beyond what the manufacturer's instructions require.
